name: HWP_ARCH_PRED_PERF_RESULTS_V
query: SELECT hdmr.person_id, hdmr.assignment_id, hdmr.pred_value worker_pred_perf FROM hwp_data_mining_process hdmp, hwp_arch_data_mining_results hdmr, hwp_models_b hmb WHERE hdmp.model_code = 'HWP_PERF_MODEL' AND hdmr.process_id = hdmp.process_id AND hdmp.model_code = hmb.model_code
